phases.title: Core Editor
phases.summary: Konva.js canvas editor with shape tools, selection, transformation, property editing, and background image support.
tasks: Konva.js canvas setup
Shape drawing tools (rect, ellipse, polygon)
Selection & transformation handles
Property panel (fill, stroke, size, position)
Background image upload & positioning

phases.title: Exhibitor Booths
phases.summary: First-class booth elements with domain-specific properties (booth code, assigned exhibitor, area calculation).
tasks: Booth element type & rendering
Booth code & exhibitor name properties
Area calculation (sq ft / m²)
Booth label display on canvas
Booth-specific property panel fields

phases.title: Attendee-Facing Map Viewer
phases.summary: Read-only interactive viewer with pan/zoom, booth click-to-detail, search/highlight, exhibitor list, and responsive mobile layout.
tasks: Read-only canvas with pan & zoom
Booth click-to-detail panel
Search & highlight by exhibitor name
Sidebar exhibitor list
Responsive mobile layout

phases.title: Additional Editor Tools
phases.summary: Grid, snap-to-grid, undo/redo, copy/paste, multi-select, import/export, and additional drawing tools.
tasks: Grid overlay & snap-to-grid
Undo / redo stack
Copy / paste elements
Multi-select & group transform
JSON import / export
Additional drawing tools (line, freehand)

phases.title: Layer System & Background Rethink
phases.summary: Fixed layer architecture (Background, Content, Pathing, Markup) with visibility toggles, z-ordering, canvas resize, and background color.
tasks: Fixed layer architecture (Background, Content, Pathing, Markup)
Layer visibility toggles
Z-ordering within layers
Canvas resize tool
Background color picker

phases.title: Walkable Layer (Editor)
phases.summary: Authoring system for defining walkable and impassable regions on the floor plan — the data foundation for wayfinding.
tasks: Walkable region drawing tools
Impassable region markup
Grid cell resolution settings
Walkable layer visibility toggle
Persist walkable grid in floor plan data

phases.title: Wayfinding: Pathfinding (Viewer)
phases.summary: A* pathfinding on the walkable grid. Pick a start and destination by booth/exhibitor name or tap-on-map, get a visual route.
tasks: A* pathfinding on walkable grid
Start / destination picker (booth name or tap)
Visual route overlay on canvas
Route distance / ETA display
Clear / reset route action
knownLimitations: Wayfinding routes to enclosed rooms (meeting rooms, session areas) terminate at the nearest walkable cell on the element's bounding box — which may be a wall rather than the actual doorway. The system has no concept of where a door is. Future fix: add optional entrance point(s) to location elements (booth, session_area, meeting_room, poi). Each entrance is a Point placed on the element's perimeter by the organiser, marking the doorway. The wayfinding system routes to the nearest entrance point instead of the bounding box edge. Supports multiple entrances per room. Falls back to current bounding-box behaviour if no entrance is defined. See KNOWN-ISSUES.md.

phases.title: Scale Calibration, Dimensions & Rulers
phases.summary: Two-point calibration tool, X/Y rulers (HTML overlays, toggleable), transient measurement tool, View menu for display toggles, real-unit display propagation, and viewer scale bar. ~20 story points across 6 steps.
tasks: Schema updates + unit conversion utilities (formatMeasurement, formatArea, derivePixelsPerUnit)
Two-point scale calibration tool with persistent reference points (visible only when calibrating)
View menu (new top-level menu) — migrate grid/snap toggles from Tools, add ruler toggle
X/Y rulers as HTML Canvas 2D overlays outside Konva Stage (toggleable, off by default, unit-aware)
Transient measurement tool (click two points, show distance, disappears on tool switch)
Unit display propagation (Properties Panel, Canvas Resize Dialog, booth area) + viewer scale bar
Walking time estimates on wayfinding routes (~1.0 m/s indoor event pace, shown when calibrated)
Display unit switcher in status bar (calibrate in inches, display in metres)
Shift-snap for calibration and measurement tools (horizontal/vertical/45°)

phases.title: New Drawing Tools, Labels & Opacity
phases.summary: Arrow, arc, and freeform polygon drawing tools, label customization with 9-point positioning, bulk label edit for multi-select, and per-element opacity. ~26 story points across 8 steps.
tasks: Arrow tool (extends line, Konva Arrow, triangle/chevron styles, shortcut A)
Arc geometry + quadratic Bézier rendering (custom sceneFunc with quadraticCurveTo)
Arc drawing tool (click-click-drag UX) + 3-point control handle editing
Freeform polygon tool (multi-click vertex placement, snap-to-close, shift-constrain, Enter/Escape/double-click, shortcut P)
Line/arrow/arc/polygon drag-select fix (segment-rect intersection for zero-area bounds)
Snap-to-object fix for non-rect geometries (anchor offset correction)
Label customization (position 3x3 picker, color, font size, bold/italic/underline, background with opacity, visibility with editor ghost indicator)
Bulk label edit for multi-select (batch update as single undo entry, mixed-state detection, Hide/Show All Labels)
Per-element opacity slider (0-100%, single and multi-select)
Copy-paste undo flooding fix (addElements bulk mutation)
Canvas resize scales points arrays for lines/arcs/polygons

phases.title: Session Locations & Meeting Rooms (Editor)
phases.summary: First-class session and meeting room editor tools with grouped Locations toolbar menu, dedicated shape components, convert actions, and BoothShape geometry refactor. ~14 story points across 6 steps.
tasks: Grouped Locations tool menu (ToolGroup component — booth, session, meeting room in horizontal flyout, last-selected icon, ▶ indicator)
BoothShape refactored to accept Geometry union (rect + polygon branches, getGeometryBounds utility)
Session Location tool (ToolDefinition, SessionAreaShape, green #27AE60, 🎤 icon, shortcut S)
Meeting Room tool (ToolDefinition, MeetingRoomShape, orange #F39C12, 🚪 icon, shortcut N)
Convert actions (context menu: Convert to Booth/Session/Meeting Room/Shape between all types, single undo entry)
Sample data (Breakout Room A, Workshop Room, VIP Lounge added to sample map)

phases.title: Session Locations & Meeting Rooms (Viewer)
phases.summary: Viewer integration for session locations and meeting rooms — interactive hover+click, detail popovers, sidebar tabs, search across all types, mobile bottom sheet.
tasks: Interactive session areas and meeting rooms in viewer (hover highlight + click)
Detail popovers for session areas and meeting rooms (name, capacity, placeholder text)
Sidebar tabs (Exhibitors / Sessions / Meeting Rooms) with auto-hide for empty tabs
Search extension across all three element types with type badges
Mobile bottom sheet tab structure

phases.title: Legend Persistence & Customization
phases.summary: Configurable, persisted legend with custom entries, colors, positioning, viewer canvas overlay, and viewer appearance controls for booth states.
tasks: Legend editor dialog (add / edit / remove entries, custom colors)
Legend position picker (four corners)
Persist legend in floor plan data (FloorPlanData.legend)
LegendCanvasOverlay — renders legend on Konva stage in editor
Viewer appearance — per-state visual treatments for organizer and attendee views (opacity, hatch, border, none)
TypeDefaultsPanel — per-type visual defaults (fill, stroke, opacity, label) saved in typeStyles

phases.title: Placement Mode Pivot & Editor Polish
phases.summary: Pivoted location elements (booths, sessions, meeting rooms) from drawing tools to a dedicated Placement Mode panel. Drag-to-place, click-to-assign, per-section search and filters, configurable placement dimensions, and auto-arrange. Viewer boothSlug linkage fix.
tasks: Tool sidebar redesign — wider (w-64), labeled tools, Design / Placement Mode tab switcher
Removed booth / session location / meeting room drawing tools from sidebar (ToolGroup component deleted)
usePlacementRecords hook — derives placed/unplaced status from canvas elements vs record pool; clean swap point for Phase 15 backend wiring
PlacementPanel — collapsible sections (Booths, Session Locations, Meeting Rooms, Tables stub) with placed/unplaced counts
Per-section search (magnifying glass toggle) and status filter (funnel popover: All / Placed / Unplaced)
Drag-to-place — HTML5 drag from panel row, ghost preview on canvas, drop creates linked element
Click-to-assign — select existing element on canvas then click record row to link them; incompatible type notice
Placement drop dimensions wired to ElementTypeDefaults (defaultWidth / defaultHeight fields added to interface and DEFAULT_TYPE_STYLES)
Default Width / Height inputs in TypeDefaultsPanel
Save as Default Style now captures element geometry dimensions alongside visual properties
Auto-arrange (sparkle) — grid-places all unplaced records of a type to the right of existing content as a single undo entry; tooltip reflects full unplaced count regardless of active filter
Viewer boothSlug linkage fix — exhibitors linked by boothSlug (stable PheedLoop DB identifier) not boothCode (display label); fixes broken exhibitor↔booth associations

phases.title: UX Polish & Canvas Improvements
phases.summary: Quality-of-life improvements: middle-click panning, hover states, selection accuracy, transform controls toggle, overlap validation, arrow rendering fix, icon picker polish, and viewer improvements.
tasks: Middle-click / Space+drag pan — fixes longstanding bug where dragging on empty canvas in multi-select mode started a selection rectangle instead of panning
Hover states on canvas elements — subtle highlight in Select mode, cursor switches to move
Area selection refinement — drag-select uses accurate per-geometry bounding boxes for all shape types
Transform controls toggle — View menu option to show/hide selection handles and bounding boxes
Overlap validation warning — banner at bottom of canvas when Content layer elements overlap; click to locate
Arrow and ArrowShape rendering fixes — arrowhead transform no longer breaks on resize
IconPicker — Escape key closes picker; anchor-based fixed positioning prevents viewport clipping (fixes known issue #8)
ViewerCanvas rendering and interaction improvements

phases.title: Object Grouping & Alignment Tools
phases.summary: Figma-style persistent groups with proportional resize and group editing mode, plus alignment, distribution, and arrange-as-grid tools.
tasks: GroupDefinition data model — groups array on FloorPlanData, groupId on ElementProperties; backward-compatible
createGroup / dissolveGroup / batchUpdateGeometry mutations — single undo entry each
Group selection — clicking any member selects the entire group; dashed bounding box overlay
GroupTransformer — virtual rect + Konva Transformer; proportional scale of all member positions and sizes
Group editing mode — double-click enters, Escape exits; outside elements dim to 35% opacity
Options bar Group / Ungroup / Enter Group / Exit Group buttons
Context menu Group / Ungroup / Enter Group entries; Cmd+G / Cmd+Shift+G shortcuts
Correctness: orphan group cleanup on delete, paste strips groupId, drag-select expands to full groups
Alignment tools — 6 icon buttons (left/center/right, top/middle/bottom); group-aware; works inside group editing mode
Distribute H/V — equal spacing within bounding box; shown for 3+ units
Arrange as Grid dialog — columns, computed rows, H/V gap; anchors to top-left of current selection

phases.title: Backend Integration
phases.summary: Connect to the PheedLoop backend — save/load maps, wire Placement Mode to real records, ship the editor in raichu and the viewer in Charmander.
tasks: Save / load floor plans via PheedLoop API (replace localStorage persistence)
Autosave with debounce and conflict detection
Placement Mode data feed — booths, sessions, meeting rooms from real backend records with placed/unplaced status
Properties panel assignment fallback — searchable record picker for unlinked elements
Viewer data fetching — replace sample data with API fetch; real exhibitor names, logos, session titles
Editor published as npm package for raichu consumption
Viewer hosted in Charmander or as standalone web app

phases.title: Booth Exhibitor Display in Viewer
phases.summary: Show exhibitor name (and optionally logo) on booth shapes in the viewer. Per-map Viewer Display settings in the editor. Depends on Phase 15.
tasks: viewerSettings data model — showBoothCode, showExhibitorName, showExhibitorLogo flags on FloorPlanData
Viewer Display section in PropertiesPanel when nothing selected (replaces empty state)

Unassigned booths: reduced opacity (~0.65), booth code only
Exhibitor logo toggle wired in editor UI; Konva image rendering stubbed pending Phase 15 data

phases.title: Coordinate Display & Layer Auto-Select
